name: The Morrigan
subtitle: Full Correspondences
flowText: The Morrigan embodies war, fate, sorcery — under Mars · Saturn; in Scorpio.

related.name: ♄ Saturn
related.teaser: Saturn is the black mountain — the ring of time, stern father, weight of law.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Loki
related.teaser: Loki embodies trickery, change, mischief — under Mercury · Uranus; in Gemini, Aquarius.

related.name: ♂ Mars
related.teaser: Mars is the blade of fire — spear of will, tower’s flame, the storm of courage.

related.name: ♃ Jupiter
related.teaser: Jupiter is the thunder scepter — wheel of fate, king of sky, expansion of spirit.

related.name: Odin
related.teaser: Odin embodies sky, thunder, sovereignty — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Mokosh
related.teaser: Mokosh embodies creation, cosmic order — under Sun · Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Shiva
related.teaser: Shiva embodies creation, cosmic order — under Sun · Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Zhurong
related.teaser: Zhurong embodies creation, cosmic order — under Sun · Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Dagda
related.teaser: Dagda embodies creation, cosmic order — under Sun · Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Bastet
related.teaser: Bastet embodies creation, cosmic order — under Sun · Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Mazu
related.teaser: Mazu embodies creation, cosmic order — under Sun · Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.
